### 🌍 Trade Risk (Workstream 7A)
- **Products**: Paper goods, notebooks, stationery, office supplies — standard retail category

- **No sanctioned country exposure**
- **Pudahuel warehouse** is consistent with import/distribution logistics (near Arturo Merino Benítez International Airport)
- Chile has broad FTAs (US-Chile, EU-Chile, Pacific Alliance) — stationery imports entirely unrestricted
